name: 💡 Feature Request

---

## 💡 What Problem Does This Solve?

A clear and concise description of the problem or gap you're experiencing.
> Example: "I always have to manually tag 3 files every time I switch models..."

## 🚀 Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or improvement you'd like to see.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches or workarounds you've tried or thought about.

## 🖼️ Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, or any other context to help explain the idea.
